title: AFK+
description:
AFK+ Datapack

A simple datapack that detects when players are AFK!

After 5 minutes of inactivity, the player gets an AFK tag in the tab list and a chat message.

Great for servers to easily see who’s idle.

Upcoming update: easier customization for AFK.
body:
**Created by asafusa553**

![Shows how it looks ig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ba867f5624311b4037f0f92979c41344c652e8d_0.webp)

The AFK+ Datapack brings smart inactivity detection to your Minecraft world. After 5 minutes of no activity, players are automatically marked as AFK.

✨ Features:

Detects when a player is inactive for 5 minutes.

Displays a clear chat message: “You are AFK.”

Adds an AFK tag to the player for easy tracking.

Perfect for multiplayer servers to identify idle players.

Whether you’re running a community server or just playing with friends, AFK+ helps create a smoother, more organized experience by making it easy to see who’s really active.

Enjoy a dynamic, responsive, and server-friendly environment with AFK+!

And yes, I created this a year ago... I just for some reason didn't know to upload so it was draft for that long.
